title: Go backup list/download/rotate/delete local parity candidate

evidence.backup_download: download creates a managed prism_backup_*.db file and returns a SQLite payload
evidence.retention: default retention and explicit keep/keep_count rotation preserve bounded backup counts
evidence.path_safety: delete accepts only managed backup filenames under PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/backups and rejects arbitrary names

boundaries: Does not promote production/default backup ownership.
Does not run against production knowledge.db or production backups.
Does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy or systemd, change frontend defaults, remove Python, or expand public exposure.
